title: reproducing_artifact
description: Artifact produced by the reproducing room: evidence that the bug is reliably reproducible plus the services / components implicated.

summary_title.description: One-line title used in the checkpoint inbox entry.

summary_markdown.description: Human-readable markdown summary delivered to the transport.

bug_verified.description: True only if a deterministic reproduction (test, script, or recorded sequence) was produced.

evidence_paths.description: Files written during reproduction (tests, logs, snapshots).

environment_check.description: Optional environment-readiness snapshot the room may capture before declaring the bug reproducible. All booleans default to absent (unknown) — the artifact remains valid without this block.

notes.description: Free-text note explaining anything not covered by the boolean fields.
